title: The Pittsburgh Businesses Actually Showing Up On Their Own Feed
subtitle: The minority that are posting, ranked by Instagram momentum
angle: most Pittsburgh small businesses on this index are dormant on Instagram. These are the ones that aren't, ranked by 30-day cadence and engagement.
intro:
Of the hundreds of Pittsburgh small businesses tracked in this index, most haven't posted to Instagram in over a month. Some haven't posted in a year. This list is the exception: the ten that are actually showing up on their own feed, ranked by 30-day posting cadence and engagement momentum.

A few names here demand some context. Kyo Matcha has 39 creators generating 1.79 million TikTok plays for a shop that has no TikTok account. That gap between earned attention and owned presence is the defining tension of this quarter's rankings. Hidden Harbor lands first among Pittsburgh bars on the strength of 765 reviews and 425,000 creator plays, none of which it had to produce itself. Allegheny Coffee and Tea Exchange sits atop both coffee categories on similar borrowed momentum, 607,052 creator plays and counting.

What the list can't yet tell you is whether any of these businesses will close that gap before summer. A few are closer than they appear. Issue 02 will track exactly that, measuring which shops converted passive buzz into owned audience over the next 90 days, and which ones let the moment pass.

items.name: Kyo Matcha
items.descriptor: Thirty-Nine Creators Are Handing Kyo Matcha 1.79 Million Plays. The Shop's Own TikTok Hasn't Answered.

featured_tiktok.author: andremelendez
featured_tiktok.caption: this matcha place deserves more hype👀 #matchalover #fluffiestmatcha #matchaspot

items.playbook_top_move: Close the review sentiment gap now. Sentiment sits 16 points below the family median; address portion consistency on soft serve and close-time enforcement before the next review cycle compounds the gap.

items.name: Spot of Coffee
items.descriptor: Number Two In Coffee, Powered By 24 Creators. Spot Of Coffee Isn't On TikTok.
items.playbook_top_move: Put a website on your Google listing. Conversion Path is the only signal below the family median; a linked website is the fastest fix and costs nothing.

items.name: Golden Age Beer Company
items.descriptor: Second In Breweries On Word Of Mouth Alone, TikTok Has Not Entered The Picture.
items.playbook_top_move: Address the food consistency problem publicly. The negative reviews all name the same issues: overcooking, over-seasoning, price-value on specific dishes. Acknowledge the gap and show the kitchen fixing it.

items.name: Allegheny Coffee & Tea Exchange
items.descriptor: Number One In Both Coffee Families, Carried By 607,052 Creator Plays The Shop Did Not Have To Earn.

featured_tiktok.author: pittsburghpg
featured_tiktok.caption:
HBO Max's award-winning medical drama “The Pitt” does a lot of things to ground itself in Pittsburgh.
Its emergency room is based on that of Allegheny General Hospital on the North Side. There are a variety of local references, including on

items.playbook_top_move: Convert creator energy into reel reach. With 5 reels posted this month and a 1.23 percent engagement rate, the gap is not volume but pull; study the framing and pacing of the top @pittsburghpg cut for format cues.

items.name: Hidden Harbor
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Bars, Built On 765 Reviews And 425K Creator Plays, All Without A TikTok Account.
items.playbook_top_move: Claim the TikTok audience already waiting. Ten creators generated 425,844 plays this quarter with no owned account to capture any follow-through or search traffic.

items.name: Page's
items.descriptor: Number One In Pittsburgh Sweets, Carried By 3,145 Reviews. Fourteen TikTok Creators Are Posting, Where Page's Still Has No Account.
items.playbook_top_move: Claim the TikTok account now. Fourteen creators have posted 177K plays this quarter to an audience Page's cannot follow back or convert; a basic account fixes that immediately.

items.name: Tazza D'Oro
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Cafes On Review Depth, But Video Signal Has Not Arrived.

featured_tiktok.author: latashaforpa
featured_tiktok.caption:
I might even buy you a coffee… ☕️ 

Stop by Tazza D’oro to pick-up, drop-off or sign my petition to get on the ballot in the May 19 Primary Election!

Team #Mayes2026 will be there 9A-3P Saturdays and Sundays starting today, February 21!

#

items.playbook_top_move: Start posting Reels before next quarter. Zero Reels in 30 days is the single clearest gap; one short drink-prep or seasonal-menu clip per week would directly address the lowest signal axis.

items.name: Jeni's Splendid Ice Creams
items.descriptor: Second In Ice Cream, Built On 1.15 Million Plays It Doesn't Own.

featured_tiktok.author: morganchompz
featured_tiktok.caption: Trying Jeni’s spring ice cream flavor lineup! 🍦💐 Have you tried any of these? @Jeni’s Splendid Ice Creams #icecream #dessert #newfood #foodreview #snacks

items.playbook_top_move: Open a Jeni's TikTok account now. Thirty-five creators posted 37-plus videos pulling 1.15 million plays this quarter; a verified account lets the business tag back, capture followers, and redirect that traffic.

items.name: Hop Farm Brewing Company
items.descriptor: Number One Brewery, Built On 171,000 TikTok Plays It Doesn't Own.

featured_tiktok.author: stevenjamesyuhasz
featured_tiktok.caption: The staff and customer service here was unbelievable. Definitely the type of place I want to support. @B&K Farm Market #warren #youngstown #cortland #ohio

items.playbook_top_move: Claim the TikTok ground others built. Open a Hop Farm TikTok account and repost the top creator clips, starting with the 51,500-play video from @stevenjamesyuhasz.

items.name: Delanie's Coffee Shadyside
items.descriptor: Sixteen Creators Filmed It This Quarter. Delanie's Has No TikTok To Show For It.

featured_tiktok.author: stephr0se8
featured_tiktok.caption:
Some of my fave local coffee shops! Drop some more reccs for me to try 👇🏼
#localcoffeeshop #pittsburgh #coffeetok #supportsmallbusiness #fyp

items.playbook_top_move: Claim a TikTok presence before momentum shifts. Sixteen unique creators posted 17 videos to TikTok this quarter; the shop has no account to collect that attention or redirect it.
